results.title: Canadian Grand Prix organizers prepare for earlier race date, possible Habs run
results.description: By Morgan Lowrie The Canadian Press Posted May 13, 2026 8:07 pm 1 min read Descrease article font size Increase article font size Organizers of the Canadian Grand Prix say they’re ready for their new, earlier slot on the Formula One calendar, even if it raises the possibility of overlap with a Montreal Canadiens playoff run.
